scripts.check: bun run check:backend && bun run check:frontend
scripts.check:backend: bunx tsc --project backend/module-based/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc --project backend/type-based/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check:frontend: bunx tsc --project frontend/module-based/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc --project frontend/type-based/tsconfig.json --noEmit
